arabic: تَجَوَّلْتُ فِي السُّوقِ الْكَبِيرِ لِشِرَاءِ بَعْضِ الْهَدَايَا. وَجَدْتُ مَصْنُوعَاتٍ يَدَوِيَّةً رَائِعَةً وَمَلَابِسَ تَقْلِيدِيَّةً. تَحَدَّثْتُ مَعَ الْبَائِعِ عَنْ أَسْعَارِ التُّحَفِ الصَّغِيرَةِ. اشْتَرَيْتُ هَدِيَّةً لِعَائِلَتِي وَلِأَصْدِقَائِي فِي الْوَطَنِ. كَانَ النَّاسُ فِي السُّوقِ لُطَفَاءَ وَوَدُودِينَ جِدًّا.
translation: Prošetao sam velikom pijacom kako bih kupio neke poklone. Pronašao sam divne ručne radove i tradicionalnu odjeću. Razgovarao sam sa prodavcem o cijenama malih suvenira. Kupio sam poklon za svoju porodicu i prijatelje u domovini. Ljudi na pijaci su bili veoma ljubazni i srdačni.
translationEn: I wandered through the large market to buy some gifts. I found wonderful handicrafts and traditional clothes. I spoke with the seller about the prices of small souvenirs. I bought a gift for my family and my friends back home. The people in the market were very kind and friendly.
